title: chamaenerion obscurum
intro: Chamaenerion obscurum, also known as the dark flowering ragwort, is a plant species in the family Onagraceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful for treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Chamaenerion obscurum include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and provide relief from various skin conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant often involve infusions or decoctions of the leaves or flowers, which can be used topically or taken orally under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
